title: No Rename italic
description: A datapack that removes italic formatting from renamed item names using commands!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1677e029fb7a3f9bcddf156deaf8efb5a322979_0.webp)

![Blank Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e98111b05a2ecc7a51024d1a66189b937f7c952_0.webp)

![No Rename talic - About x18px](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebb67f31879df4692d1bf05a5c7c3e1d9a614113_0.webp)

This datapack removes the default italic formatting applied to renamed item names in Minecraft. Instead of the usual italic text, item names will appear in a clean, normal font for better readability and a more polished UI experience.

![Blank Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e98111b05a2ecc7a51024d1a66189b937f7c952_0.webp)

![No Rename talic - Command description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2742c2ed06b907b4371372d77ac13424038cc1a9_0.webp)

`/trigger no_italic.fix`: to fix the item name formatting.

- In multiplayer, only one player can use the system at a time.
- In single-player, it can be used without any restrictions.
- It only applies to items placed in hotbar slots.
- Additionally, this does not work with colored or custom-styled item names.

![Blank Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e98111b05a2ecc7a51024d1a66189b937f7c952_0.webp)

![No Rename talic - Video](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94a81dc16ce82d2615714373ba0633b264ab613a_0.webp)
